sizing_rule.note: Position size derived from parametric distribution using mean (U), standard deviation (S), and sigma-based price movement expectations. Optimal f calculation method referenced but specific f value not disclosed by author. Requires calculation of expected price values across specified sigma bounds to determine position magnitude.

source_rule_text: Position sizing is determined by constructing a parametric distribution using mean (U), standard deviation (S), and standardized unit values (E) to establish the range of expected future price movements in sigma units.
